app.name: Optique
app.one_liner: Type-safe combinatorial CLI parser for TypeScript inspired by Haskell's optparse-applicative and Zod.

screens.name: Parser Builder
screens.purpose: Construct and compose CLI parsers using modular combinators with real-time type feedback.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a composed CLI parser configuration for reuse or documentation generation.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core parser combinators (object, optional, or)
acceptance_tests: A user can define a CLI parser using object() and optional() combinators and receive correct TypeScript types.
Shell completions for Bash and zsh are correctly generated from a composed parser.
